exercises.title: General Notes & Warm-Up
exercises.notes:
Pull–Push Gym Monster 2 — Power Week

All work on GM2 (Smith + cables). Hypertrophy: RPE 8–9 (1–2 RIR). Power triples: ~85–90% of today's triple; 1 RIR on sets 1–2. Do not superset power work.

General warm-up (every day, GM2):
Face Pull (Cable) 1×10; Cable Twist (Up to Down) 1×10/side light; Seated Cable Row – Bar Grip 1×10; Face Pull 1×10 (ER emphasis); OH Triceps Extension (Cable) 1×10/side light; RDL (Smith) 1×10; Cable Row 1×10; Squat (Smith) ×5 → OHP (Smith) ×5 complex.

See programs/khoiphan21/push-pull-gym-monster-2 for tempo/volume weeks and progression.

exercises.title: Close-Grip Bench Press (Smith Machine)
exercises.notes: Power: 3×3. Grip ~shoulder width. Ramp: empty bar ×8–10, ~50% ×3, ~70% ×2, work sets. Rest 3–4 min. +2.5 kg after clean 3×3.

exercises.title: Seated Chest Fly (Cable) — Bottom Hold
exercises.notes: Technical A1: 3×10 s bottom hold (light; squeeze stretch). Then A2 OHP Smith. 60–75 s after A2.

exercises.title: Overhead Press (Smith Machine)
exercises.notes: Technical A2: 3×3. Paired with chest fly hold.

exercises.title: Bulgarian Split Squat (Cable, Gym Monster 2)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H1: 3×8/side (GM2 cable handle). Superset with chest fly.

exercises.title: Chest Fly (Cable, Gym Monster 2)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H2: 3×12 chest fly (GM2). 60–75 s after this exercise.

exercises.title: Sissy Squat (Cable, Gym Monster 2)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H3: 3×12/side. Low pulley ~1–3, anchored feet, cable handle or belt. Superset with hammer curl.

exercises.title: Hammer Curl (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H4: 3×12. 60–75 s after this exercise.

exercises.title: General Notes & Warm-Up
exercises.notes:
Pull–Push Gym Monster 2 — Power Week

All work on GM2 (Smith + cables). Hypertrophy: RPE 8–9 (1–2 RIR). Power triples: ~85–90% of today's triple; 1 RIR on sets 1–2. Do not superset power work.

General warm-up (every day, GM2):
Face Pull (Cable) 1×10; Cable Twist (Up to Down) 1×10/side light; Seated Cable Row – Bar Grip 1×10; Face Pull 1×10 (ER emphasis); OH Triceps Extension (Cable) 1×10/side light; RDL (Smith) 1×10; Cable Row 1×10; Squat (Smith) ×5 → OHP (Smith) ×5 complex.

See programs/khoiphan21/push-pull-gym-monster-2 for tempo/volume weeks and progression.

exercises.title: Chest-Supported Row (Cable, Gym Monster 2)
exercises.notes: Power: 3×3. Works Plus ~30–45°, mid pulleys on vertical bars ~4–6, cable row bar. Ramp ~50%×5, ~70%×3, work. +2.5 kg after clean 3×3. Rest 3–4 min.

exercises.title: Straight Arm Lat Pulldown (Cable)
exercises.notes: Technical B1: 3×12 s hold (light only). Pair with upright row.

exercises.title: Upright Row (Cable)
exercises.notes: Technical B2: 3×5. 60–75 s after this exercise.

exercises.title: Single Arm Cable Row
exercises.notes: Technical B3: 3×5/side seated on bench. Own block — 2–3 min between rounds if needed.

exercises.title: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H1: 3×15. Superset with cable row.

exercises.title: Seated Cable Row - Bar Grip
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H2: 3×10 squeeze scapulae. 60–75 s after row.

exercises.title: Bicep Curl (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy: 3×12 after face pull / row pair.

exercises.title: General Notes & Warm-Up
exercises.notes:
Pull–Push Gym Monster 2 — Power Week

All work on GM2 (Smith + cables). Hypertrophy: RPE 8–9 (1–2 RIR). Power triples: ~85–90% of today's triple; 1 RIR on sets 1–2. Do not superset power work.

General warm-up (every day, GM2):
Face Pull (Cable) 1×10; Cable Twist (Up to Down) 1×10/side light; Seated Cable Row – Bar Grip 1×10; Face Pull 1×10 (ER emphasis); OH Triceps Extension (Cable) 1×10/side light; RDL (Smith) 1×10; Cable Row 1×10; Squat (Smith) ×5 → OHP (Smith) ×5 complex.

See programs/khoiphan21/push-pull-gym-monster-2 for tempo/volume weeks and progression.

Conditioning: RPE ~5–7. Circuit ×3 (giant set); EMOM 12 (odd: stair/row 45 s, even: face pull 15); finisher knee raise + crunch.

exercises.title: Seated Cable Row - V Grip (Cable)
exercises.notes: Circuit ×3: 15 reps. Giant set start.

exercises.title: Overhead Press (Smith Machine)
exercises.notes: Circuit: 15 reps light.

exercises.title: Split Squat (Smith Machine)
exercises.notes: Circuit: Split squat on Smith — 12/side.

exercises.title: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Circuit: 20 controlled reps or slow tempo. 60–90 s after round.

exercises.title: Stair Machine (Steps)
exercises.notes: EMOM odd: 45 s (6 sets for 12 min). Alternate with face pull.

exercises.title: Face Pull
exercises.notes: EMOM even: 15 reps light (6 sets).

exercises.title: Lying Knee Raise
exercises.notes: Finisher C1: accumulate 60 s total (e.g. 4×15 s). Bench + ankle strap on GM2.

exercises.title: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Finisher C2: 3×20. 60–75 s after crunches.

exercises.title: General Notes & Warm-Up
exercises.notes:
Pull–Push Gym Monster 2 — Power Week

All work on GM2 (Smith + cables). Hypertrophy: RPE 8–9 (1–2 RIR). Power triples: ~85–90% of today's triple; 1 RIR on sets 1–2. Do not superset power work.

General warm-up (every day, GM2):
Face Pull (Cable) 1×10; Cable Twist (Up to Down) 1×10/side light; Seated Cable Row – Bar Grip 1×10; Face Pull 1×10 (ER emphasis); OH Triceps Extension (Cable) 1×10/side light; RDL (Smith) 1×10; Cable Row 1×10; Squat (Smith) ×5 → OHP (Smith) ×5 complex.

See programs/khoiphan21/push-pull-gym-monster-2 for tempo/volume weeks and progression.

exercises.title: Bench Press (Smith Machine, 2s Pause)
exercises.notes: Power: 3×3 with 2 s pause on chest. Ramp: empty bar ×8–10, ~50%×3, ~70%×2, ~85%×1, work. Rest 3–4 min.

exercises.title: Overhead Press (Smith Machine) — Bottom Hold
exercises.notes: Technical D1: 3×20–30 s bottom-range hold (light).

exercises.title: Overhead Press (Smith Machine)
exercises.notes: Technical D2: 3×3.

exercises.title: Overhead Press (Cable, Gym Monster 2) — Top Hold
exercises.notes: Technical D3: 3×15 s top hold (light). 60–75 s after D3.

exercises.title: Overhead Press (Cable, Gym Monster 2)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H1: 3×8. Giant with incline.

exercises.title: Incline Bench Press (Cable, Gym Monster 2)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H2: 3×12. 60–75 s after incline.

exercises.title: Seated Leg Curl (Machine)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H3: 3×12 ankle straps. Pair with OH triceps extension.

exercises.title: Overhead Triceps Extension (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H4: 3×15. 60–75 s after extension.

exercises.title: Lateral Raise (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H5: 3×12. Pair with calf raise.

exercises.title: Standing Calf Raise (Smith)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H6: 3×12. 60–75 s after calves.

exercises.title: General Notes & Warm-Up
exercises.notes:
Pull–Push Gym Monster 2 — Power Week

All work on GM2 (Smith + cables). Hypertrophy: RPE 8–9 (1–2 RIR). Power triples: ~85–90% of today's triple; 1 RIR on sets 1–2. Do not superset power work.

General warm-up (every day, GM2):
Face Pull (Cable) 1×10; Cable Twist (Up to Down) 1×10/side light; Seated Cable Row – Bar Grip 1×10; Face Pull 1×10 (ER emphasis); OH Triceps Extension (Cable) 1×10/side light; RDL (Smith) 1×10; Cable Row 1×10; Squat (Smith) ×5 → OHP (Smith) ×5 complex.

See programs/khoiphan21/push-pull-gym-monster-2 for tempo/volume weeks and progression.

exercises.title: Romanian Deadlift (Smith Machine)
exercises.notes: Power: 3×3. Barbell hooks + pad. Ramp empty ×8–10, ~50%×3, ~70%×2, work. +2.5 kg after clean 3×3. Rest 3–4 min.

exercises.title: Lat Pulldown (Cable) — Explosive
exercises.notes: Technical E1: 1×5 warmup, then 3×3 explosive concentric (submax load; high pulleys ~7–9).

exercises.title: Single Arm Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Technical E2: 3×4/side. 60–75 s after E2.

exercises.title: Straight Arm Lat Pulldown (Cable)
exercises.notes: Technical F1: 3×12 s hold (light).

exercises.title: Lying Leg Curl (Machine)
exercises.notes: Technical F2: 3×6, 3 s eccentric on GM2 (ankle straps / bench).

exercises.title: Seated Cable Row - Bar Wide Grip
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H1: 3×10. Superset with rear delt fly.

exercises.title: Rear Delt Reverse Fly (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H2: 3×15. 60–75 s after fly.

exercises.title: Reverse Grip Lat Pulldown (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H3: 3×15 submax (kneeling). If load-capped, use supinated chest-supported row. Giant with crunch.

exercises.title: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H4: 3×12. 60–75 s after crunch.
